name: korean-ux-copy
description: Audit and improve user-facing Korean UX copy in codebases with conversion-safe rewrites, optional Kanana assistance, and LLM fallback.

interface.shortDescription: Turn awkward Korean UX copy into safer, sharper rewrites.
interface.longDescription: Audit Korean user-facing copy in codebases, classify UI surfaces, suggest one conversion-safe rewrite by default, and optionally use Kanana as a Korean rewrite provider with agent-side safety gates. If Kanana is unavailable, use runtime LLM fallback under the same claim gate.
defaultPrompt: Audit this project's Korean UX copy. Do not edit files.
Find AI-like Korean copy and show safe dry-run diffs.
Use Benefit Hook Lift and Kanana for high-impact Korean rewrites; if Kanana is unavailable, use llm_fallback with the same claim gate.
